title: Verify existing implementation of timestamp-middleware
description: The timestamp-middleware.ts and timestamp-middleware.test.ts already exist and are fully implemented. Verified: 13 tests pass, middleware adds x-timestamp header with Unix timestamp, supports custom header name, handles various request types.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Next.js middleware pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse with factory function createRequestLogger
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - similar middleware structure with config object
